140101.cherokee: ᏉᎳ, ᎠᎴ ᏌᏱᎳ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎹᏗ, ᏫᏨᏲᏪᎳᏏ ᏗᏣᏁᎶᏗ ᎢᏣᏓᏡᎬ ᏕᏏᎶᏂᎦ ᎢᏤᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏕᏣᏁᎶᏛᎢ.
140101.english: Paul, and Silvanus, and Timotheus, unto the church of the Thessalonians in God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ:
140101.phonetic: Quo-la, a-le Sa-yi-la, a-le Di-ma-di, wi-tsv-yo-we-la-si di-tsa-ne-lo-di i-tsa-da-tlu-gv De-si-lo-ni-ga i-tse-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi I-gi-do-da a-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv de-tsa-ne-lo-dv-i.

140102.cherokee: ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᏕᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
140102.english: Grace unto you, and peace, from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
140102.phonetic: Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv a-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv de-tsi-ka-hna-wa-di-do-he-s-di nv-da-yu-na-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi I-gi-do-da a-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.

140103.cherokee: ᎣᎦᏚᏓᎳ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎣᏣᎵᎡᎵᏤᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᏥᏚᏳᎪᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏲᎦᏛᏁᏗᏱ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏣᏛᏍᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏣᏓᎨᏳᏒ ᏂᏥᎥ ᎢᏥᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏥᎧᏁᏉᎦ;
140103.english: We are bound to thank God always for you, brethren, as it is meet, because that your faith groweth exceedingly, and the charity of every one of you all toward each other aboundeth;
140103.phonetic: O-ga-du-da-la ni-go-hi-lv o-tsa-li-e-li-tse-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi ni-hi i-da-li-nv-tli u-gv-wa-li, tsi-du-yu-go-di na-s-gi i-yo-ga-dv-ne-di-yi, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha i-tso-hi-yu-sv u-tsa-ti tsa-dv-s-ga, a-le de-tsa-da-ge-yu-sv ni-tsi-v i-tsi-si-yv-wi-ha ge-sv u-tsa-ti tsi-ka-ne-quo-ga;

140104.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᎣᎬᏒ ᎣᏣᏢᏈᏍᎦ ᎢᏨᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᏩᏗᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏨᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏦᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏕᏯᏙᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᎵᏯ ᎢᏥᎷᏤᎲᎢ;
140104.english: So that we ourselves glory in you in the churches of God for your patience and faith in all your persecutions and tribulations that ye endure:
140104.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-yv o-gv-sv o-tsa-tlv-qui-s-ga i-tsv-ne-i-s-di-s-gv tsu-na-ne-lo-di du-na-da-tlu-wa-di-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi di-tsv-ni-di-yu ge-sv a-le i-tso-hi-yu ge-sv ni-ga-v u-de-ya-do-di a-le a-gi-li-ya i-tsi-lu-tse-hv-i;

140105.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏧᏭᎪᏛᏗ ᏧᏭᎪᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ ᎢᏤᎯ ᎡᏤᎵᏎᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏥᏥᎩᎵᏲᎦ.
140105.english: Which is a manifest token of the righteous judgment of God, that ye may be counted worthy of the kingdom of God, for which ye also suffer:
140105.phonetic: Na-s-gi gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-hi tsi-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi du-yu-go-dv tsu-wu-go-dv-di tsu-wu-go-do-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi ye-li U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-go-hi i-tse-hi e-tse-li-se-di-yi, na-s-gi na-s-quo u-gv-wa-li tsi-tsi-gi-li-yo-ga.

140106.cherokee: ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏚᏳᎪᏛᎢ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᎫᏴᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎨᏥᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗᏍᎩ;
140106.english: Seeing it is a righteous thing with God to recompense tribulation to them that trouble you;
140106.phonetic: Nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha du-yu-go-dv-i U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-gu-yv-da-ne-di-yi a-gi-li-yo-i-s-di ge-sv na-s-gi na ge-tsi-gi-li-yo-i-s-di-s-gi;

140107.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏃ ᎡᏥᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗᏍᎩ, ᎠᏣᏪᏐᎸᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᎦᎫᏴᏓᏁᏗᏱ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎸᎶ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᎬᏁᎸᎭ ᎠᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏧᎾᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏧᏤᎵ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ,
140107.english: And to you who are troubled rest with us, when the Lord Jesus shall be revealed from heaven with his mighty angels,
140107.phonetic: Ni-hi-no e-tsi-gi-li-yo-i-s-di-s-gi, a-tsa-we-so-lv-s-do-di ge-sv e-ga-gu-yv-da-ne-di-yi, na-hi-yu U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa ga-lv-lo nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi gv-ni-ge-sv na-gv-ne-lv-ha a-ne-he-s-di tsu-na-li-ni-gi-dv tsu-tse-li di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi,

140108.cherokee: ᎠᏥᎸ ᎠᏓᏪᎵᎩᏍᎩ ᎤᏄᏬᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏓᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏂᎬᏩᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
140108.english: In flaming fire taking vengeance on them that know not God, and that obey not the gospel of our Lord Jesus Christ:
140108.phonetic: A-tsi-lv a-da-we-li-gi-s-gi u-nu-wo-s-de-s-di da-gi-li-yo-i-s-di-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi na ni-gv-wa-ga-ta-hv-na U-ne-la-nv-hi, a-le nu-no-hi-yu-sv-na o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv i-ga-tse-li u-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga.

140109.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏍᏛᏗᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎨᎬᏓᏁᏗ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎠᏓᏛᏗᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ,
140109.english: Who shall be punished with everlasting destruction from the presence of the Lord, and from the glory of his power;
140109.phonetic: Na-s-gi ge-tsi-s-dv-di-s-do-di ge-se-s-di ge-gv-da-ne-di wi-na-s-dv-na a-da-dv-di-s-gi u-gv-wi-yu-hi a-ga-ta-hv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi, a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv-i,

140110.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎬᏩᎸᏉᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏧᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎪᎯᏳᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎣᎩᏃᎮᎸ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ.
140110.english: When he shall come to be glorified in his saints, and to be admired in all them that believe (because our testimony among you was believed) in that day.
140110.phonetic: Na-hi-yu tsu-tse-li u-na-da-nv-ti gv-wa-lv-quo-do-di-yi u-gv-wa-li ga-lu-tsv-ha, a-le u-s-qua-ni-go-di tsu-da-nv-da-di-s-do-di-yi na-ni-v na-s-gi na gv-wo-hi-yu-hv-s-gi na-hi-yu i-ga ge-se-s-di, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di go-hi-yu-nv-hi ge-sv o-gi-no-he-lv i-tse-hv-i.

140111.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎣᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᎢᏨᏯᏅᏓᏗᏍᎪ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᎦᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏯᏅᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᏯᏅᏔᏅᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏅᏘᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ;
140111.english: Wherefore also we pray always for you, that our God would count you worthy of this calling, and fulfil all the good pleasure of his goodness, and the work of faith with power:
140111.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di na-s-quo ni-go-hi-lv o-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-go i-tsv-ya-nv-da-di-s-go, na-s-gi O-ga-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-ya-nv-di ge-sv i-tsi-ya-nv-ta-nv-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, a-le u-s-qua-di-s-di-yi ni-ga-dv o-s-dv u-ye-lv-di ge-sv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi u-da-nv-ti-yu ge-sv-i, a-le go-hi-yu-di ge-sv tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di gv-ta-nv-hi u-li-ni-gi-dv ge-sv-i;

140112.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᏓᎶᏁᏛ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏨᏂᏌᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏰᏨᏁᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
140112.english: That the name of our Lord Jesus Christ may be glorified in you, and ye in him, according to the grace of our God and the Lord Jesus Christ.
140112.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi du-do-v i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Da-lo-ne-dv ga-lv-quo-di-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi ni-hi i-tsv-ni-sa-dv, a-le ni-hi ga-lv-quo-di-yu i-ye-tsv-ne-di-yi na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv I-ga-ne-la-nv-hi, a-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.

140201.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎢᏨᏔᏲᏎᎭ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏪᏓᏓᏟᏌᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ,
140201.english: Now we beseech you, brethren, by the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ, and by our gathering together unto him,
140201.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no, i-da-li-nv-tli, i-tsv-ta-yo-se-ha u-lu-hi-s-di ge-sv i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, a-le na-s-gi we-da-da-tli-sa-ne-di ge-sv u-gv-wa-li,

140202.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏞᎩᏉ ᏤᏥᏖᎸᎾᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏕᏯᏔᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎬᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏬᏂᏒᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎪᏪᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏗ ᎠᏴ ᎣᎦᏓᏅᏏᏛ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᎦ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎯᏕᏅ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
140202.english: That ye be not soon shaken in mind, or be troubled, neither by spirit, nor by word, nor by letter as from us, as that the day of Christ is at hand.
140202.phonetic: Na-s-gi tle-gi-quo tse-tsi-te-lv-na-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i, a-le i-tsa-de-ya-ta-ne-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na, na-s-quo a-da-nv-do gv-di, a-le ga-wo-ni-sv-hi, a-le go-we-li go-we-la-nv-hi gv-di a-yv o-ga-da-nv-si-dv tsi-ge-so i-yu-s-di; na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li i-ga u-s-qua-lv-hi-de-nv tsi-ge-so na-s-gi-ya-i.

140203.cherokee: ᎠᏎ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᏱᏥᎵᏓᏍᏔᏁᏍᏗ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ [ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎤᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ] ᎬᏂ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎠᏂᏑᎵᎪᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᏍᎦᎾ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᎬᏁᎸᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏛᏗᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᏥ;
140203.english: Let no man deceive you by any means: for that day shall not come, except there come a falling away first, and that man of sin be revealed, the son of perdition;
140203.phonetic: A-se tle-s-di gi-lo yi-tsi-li-da-s-ta-ne-s-di; v-tla-ye-no [na-hi-yu i-ga u-li-ye-i-lo-hi-s-di yi-gi] gv-ni i-gv-yi a-ni-su-li-go-ge-s-di, a-le na-s-gi na a-s-ga-ya a-s-ga-na tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi gv-ni-ge-sv na-gv-ne-lv-ha, na-s-gi a-dv-di-s-gi u-we-tsi;

140204.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏓᎦᏘᎴᎦ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏢ ᏥᎾᏓᏛᏁᎭ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᎪᏎᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᎦᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏥᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏬᎳ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᏓᏁᎸᎢ, ᎤᏩᏒ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᏓᏛᏁᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
140204.english: Who opposeth and exalteth himself above all that is called God, or that is worshipped; so that he as God sitteth in the temple of God, shewing himself that he is God.
140204.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsi-da-ga-ti-le-ga a-le ga-lv-la-di-tlv tsi-na-da-dv-ne-ha ni-ga-v U-ne-la-nv-hi ge-go-se-di tsi-gi, a-le ge-ga-da-do-li-s-da-ne-hi tsi-gi; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi-ya u-wo-la U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li a-da-ne-lv-i, u-wa-sv gv-ni-ge-sv na-da-dv-ne-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi ge-sv-i.

140205.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᏣᏅᏔ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏏ ᏥᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎲᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎢᏨᏃᎮᎮᎸᎢ?
140205.english: Remember ye not, that, when I was yet with you, I told you these things?
140205.phonetic: Tla-s-go yi-tsa-nv-ta, na-s-gi a-si tsi-tsv-ye-la-di-do-hv-gi na-s-gi hi-a i-tsv-no-he-he-lv-i?

140206.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏃ ᏥᎩ ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎭ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏲᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏯᎬᏁᏗᏱ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏯᎬᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
140206.english: And now ye know what withholdeth that he might be revealed in his time.
140206.phonetic: Go-hi-no tsi-gi i-di-ga-ta-ha i-yu-s-di a-yo-s-do-di-s-gv gv-ni-ge-sv i-ya-gv-ne-di-yi na-hi-yu gv-ni-ge-sv i-ya-gv-ne-di ge-sv-i.

140207.cherokee: ᎤᏕᎵᏛᏰᏃ ᎠᏍᎦᎾ ᎦᏳᎳ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ; ᎪᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏲᏍᏙᏗᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ ᎤᏲᏍᏙᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎬᏂ ᎠᏥᎧᎲᏒᎭ.
140207.english: For the mystery of iniquity doth already work: only he who now letteth will let, until he be taken out of the way.
140207.phonetic: U-de-li-dv-ye-no a-s-ga-na ga-yu-la du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha; go-hi-s-gi-ni ge-sv a-yo-s-do-di-s-gi tsi-gi u-yo-s-do-da-ne-he-s-di gv-ni a-tsi-ka-hv-sv-ha.

140208.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏍᎦᎾ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏰᎬᏁᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏨᏛᏛᏔᏂ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᎰᎵ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎬᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏨᏛᏛᏔᏂ ᏓᎬᏔᏂ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᎬᏁᎲ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ;
140208.english: And then shall that Wicked be revealed, whom the Lord shall consume with the spirit of his mouth, and shall destroy with the brightness of his coming:
140208.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-no na-s-gi na a-s-ga-na gv-ni-ge-sv nv-da-ye-gv-ne-li, na-s-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi tsv-dv-dv-ta-ni a-da-nv-do a-ho-li nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi gv-di, a-le tsv-dv-dv-ta-ni da-gv-ta-ni gv-ni-ge-sv na-gv-ne-hv na-hi-yu ga-lu-tsv-ha;

140209.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏎᏓᏂ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎬᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎤᏰᎸᏛᎢ,
140209.english: Even him, whose coming is after the working of Satan with all power and signs and lying wonders,
140209.phonetic: Na-s-gi na u-lu-hi-s-di ge-sv na-s-gi-ya Se-da-ni tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he-s-di gv-di-s-ge-s-di u-tsa-ti u-li-ni-gi-dv ge-sv-i, a-le u-s-qua-ni-go-di a-le ga-ye-go-gi u-ye-lv-dv-i,

140210.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏓᎵᏓᏍᏗ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏛᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᏂᏚᎾᏓᏂᎸᏨᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎠᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎨᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
140210.english: And with all deceivableness of unrighteousness in them that perish; because they received not the love of the truth, that they might be saved.
140210.phonetic: A-le gv-di-s-ge-s-di u-tsa-ti u-da-li-da-s-di ni-du-yu-go-dv-na ge-sv a-ne-hv na-s-gi ge-tsi-dv-do-di ge-sv-i; nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv ni-du-na-da-ni-lv-tsv-na ge-sv du-yu-go-dv a-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi ga-ge-tsi-s-de-lv-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

140211.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏅᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᏗᏱ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎤᏂᎶᏄᎮᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ;
140211.english: And for this cause God shall send them strong delusion, that they should believe a lie:
140211.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi i-yu-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-nv-s-di ge-se-s-di u-ni-lu-tse-di-yi u-li-ni-gi-dv u-ni-lo-nu-he-s-gi na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-so-di u-no-hi-yu-di-yi ga-ye-go-gi ge-sv-i;

140212.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎬᏩᎾᏚᎪᏓᏁᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎾᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ.
140212.english: That they all might be damned who believed not the truth, but had pleasure in unrighteousness.
140212.phonetic: na-s-gi di-gv-wa-na-du-go-da-ne-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi na-ni-v na-s-gi na na-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gv-na du-yu-go-dv ge-sv-i, ni-du-yu-go-dv-na-s-gi-ni ge-sv a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi.

140213.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎣᎦᏚᏓᎳ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎣᏣᎵᎡᎵᏤᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᏥᎨᏳᎯ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᎲ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎢᏣᏑᏰᏒ ᎡᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᎬᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᏥᏅᎦᎵᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ;
140213.english: But we are bound to give thanks alway to God for you, brethren beloved of the Lord, because God hath from the beginning chosen you to salvation through sanctification of the Spirit and belief of the truth:
140213.phonetic: A-se-no o-ga-du-da-la ni-go-hi-lv o-tsa-li-e-li-tse-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi ni-hi ge-sv u-gv-wa-li, i-da-li-nv-tli U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-tsi-ge-yu-hi, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-da-le-nv-hv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv i-tsa-su-ye-sv e-tsi-s-de-lv-di-yi gv-do-di-yi A-da-nv-do i-tsi-nv-ga-li-s-gv-i, a-le i-tso-hi-yu-sv u-do-hi-yu-hi ge-sv-i;

140214.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏥᏕᏲᎧᏅ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎣᎦᏤᎵ ᏥᏥᏯᏅᏔᏅ, ᎢᏥᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
140214.english: Whereunto he called you by our gospel, to the obtaining of the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.
140214.phonetic: Na-hna tsi-de-yo-ka-nv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv o-ga-tse-li tsi-tsi-ya-nv-ta-nv, i-tsi-wa-dv-di-yi ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga.

140215.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏕᏥᏙᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏥᏂᏴᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏕᏲᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎡᏤᏲᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎦᏬᏂᏒᎯᏉ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏫᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎸᎯ ᏱᎩ.
140215.english: Therefore, brethren, stand fast, and hold the traditions which ye have been taught, whether by word, or our epistle.
140215.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, i-da-li-nv-tli, u-li-ni-gi-dv de-tsi-do-ge-s-di, a-le de-tsi-ni-yv-se-s-di di-de-yo-di ge-sv na-s-gi nu-s-dv e-tse-yo-nv-i, na-s-quo ga-wo-ni-sv-hi-quo yi-gi, a-le wi-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-lv-hi yi-gi.

140216.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏩᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎩᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᎩᏁᎸ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᏓᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎬᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ,
140216.english: Now our Lord Jesus Christ himself, and God, even our Father, which hath loved us, and hath given us everlasting consolation and good hope through grace,
140216.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv u-wa-sv, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi I-gi-do-da, na-s-gi i-gi-ge-yu-hi-yu tsi-ge-sv-gi, a-le tsi-gi-ne-lv u-li-s-qua-di-s-di ni-ge-sv-na a-da-ga-li-s-da-di-s-gi, a-le o-s-dv u-du-gi gv-di ge-sv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv-i,

140217.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏥᎦᎵᏍᏓᏕᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᎾᏫ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏣᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ.
140217.english: Comfort your hearts, and stablish you in every good word and work.
140217.phonetic: Na-s-gi di-tsi-ga-li-s-da-de-di ge-se-s-di di-tsi-na-wi, a-le di-tsa-li-ni-go-hi-s-do-di ge-se-s-di ni-ga-v o-s-dv ge-sv i-tsi-wo-ni-hi-s-di-yi a-le di-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi.

140301.cherokee: ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗᏃ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᏯᏅᏓᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᏰᎵᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ;
140301.english: Finally, brethren, pray for us, that the word of the Lord may have free course, and be glorified, even as it is with you:
140301.phonetic: U-li-s-qua-lv-di-no ge-sv-i, i-da-li-nv-tli, i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di a-yv s-gi-ya-nv-da-di-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi ka-no-he-dv U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li-ga u-ye-li-hi-s-di-yi, a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi-ya tsi-nu-s-di ni-hi i-tse-hv-i;

140302.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᏣᏚᏓᎳᎡᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏲ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎾ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏳᏁᎭ.
140302.english: And that we may be delivered from unreasonable and wicked men: for all men have not faith.
140302.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi tso-tsa-du-da-la-e-di-yi u-ni-yo a-le a-ni-s-ga-na a-ni-s-ga-ya; v-tla-ye-no na-ni-v go-hi-yu-di ge-sv yu-ne-ha.

140303.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏄᏓᎵᏓᏍᏛᎾ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏨᏓᏣᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏔᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᏨᎵᏥᏲᏍᏙᏓᏁᎵ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᏗᏱ.
140303.english: But the Lord is faithful, who shall stablish you, and keep you from evil.
140303.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi-s-gi-ni nu-da-li-da-s-dv-na, na-s-gi tsv-da-tsa-li-ni-go-hi-s-ta-ni, a-le tsv-li-tsi-yo-s-do-da-ne-li u-yo i-tsa-dv-ne-di-yi.

140304.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎣᏣᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏂᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏎ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᏨᏁᏤᎲᎢ.
140304.english: And we have confidence in the Lord touching you, that ye both do and will do the things which we command you.
140304.phonetic: A-le o-tsa-li-s-ga-s-do-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi ni-hi ge-sv u-gv-wa-li, na-s-gi ni-tsa-dv-ne-hv-i, a-le a-se na-s-gi i-tsa-dv-ne-di ge-sv nu-s-dv i-tsv-ne-tse-hv-i.

140305.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏧᏎᎮᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᎾᏫ ᎡᏥᎨᏳᎢ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏨᏂᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
140305.english: And the Lord direct your hearts into the love of God, and into the patient waiting for Christ.
140305.phonetic: A-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi tsu-se-he-di ge-se-s-di di-tsi-na-wi e-tsi-ge-yu-i i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi, a-le di-tsv-ni-di-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi Ga-lo-ne-dv na-s-gi-ya-i.

140306.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎢᏨᏁᏤᎭ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎣᏨᏗᎭ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏣᏓᏓᎴᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᎢᏯᎾᏛᏁᎵᏙᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᏓᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏕᎬᎾ ᏗᏕᏲᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏴ ᏗᎪᎦᏓᏂᎸᏤᎸᎯ,
140306.english: Now we command you, brethren, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, that ye withdraw yourselves from every brother that walketh disorderly, and not after the tradition which he received of us.
140306.phonetic: Hna-quo-no i-tsv-ne-tse-ha, i-da-li-nv-tli, o-tsv-di-ha du-do-v i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, na-s-gi di-tsa-da-da-le-da-ne-di-yi na-ni-v a-na-li-nv-tli u-tsa-ti-ni i-ya-na-dv-ne-li-do-hi, a-le ni-da-ni-ka-hna-wa-de-gv-na di-de-yo-di ge-sv a-yv di-go-ga-da-ni-lv-tse-lv-hi,

140307.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏒᏰᏃ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᏍᎩᏍᏓᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᏱᏃᏣᏛᏁᎵᏙᎮ ᎢᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎲᎢ;
140307.english: For yourselves know how ye ought to follow us: for we behaved not ourselves disorderly among you;
140307.phonetic: I-yu-sv-ye-no i-tsi-ga-ta-ha i-tsa-dv-ne-di-yi s-gi-s-da-wa-dv-s-di-yi; v-tla-ye-no u-tsa-ti-ni yi-no-tsa-dv-ne-li-do-he i-tsv-ye-la-di-do-hv-i;

140308.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏎᏉ ᏲᏣᎵᏍᏓᏴᎾᏁᎮᎢ; ᏙᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎴ ᏙᎩᏯᏪᏥᏙᎲᎩ ᎬᏩᎩᏨᏗ, ᏃᎦᏚᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏂᏣᏛᏅ ᎦᎨᏛ ᎢᏲᏨᏴᏁᏗᏱ;
140308.english: Neither did we eat any man's bread for nought; but wrought with labour and travail night and day, that we might not be chargeable to any of you:
140308.phonetic: V-tla a-le gi-lo a-se-quo yo-tsa-li-s-da-yv-na-ne-he-i; do-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-gi-s-gi-ni a-le do-gi-ya-we-tsi-do-hv-gi gv-wa-gi-tsv-di, no-ga-du-li-s-gv-na ge-sv i-yu-s-di a-yv a-si-yv-wi ni-tsa-dv-nv ga-ge-dv i-yo-tsv-yv-ne-di-yi;

140309.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᏃᎩᎲᎾ ᎨᏒ [ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎢᏲᎦᏛᏁᏗᏱ] ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᎢ, ᏗᏣᏟᎶᏍᏙᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᏃᏣᏓᏛᏁᎲ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᏍᏓᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ.
140309.english: Not because we have not power, but to make ourselves an ensample unto you to follow us.
140309.phonetic: V-tla no-gi-hv-na ge-sv [nv-wa-da-le i-yo-ga-dv-ne-di-yi] yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-i, di-tsa-tli-lo-s-do-di-s-gi-ni no-tsa-da-dv-ne-hv a-yv s-gi-s-da-wa-dv-s-di-yi nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi.

140310.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏰᏃ ᏥᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎲᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛᎩ ᎢᏨᏁᏤᎸᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏄᏚᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
140310.english: For even when we were with you, this we commanded you, that if any would not work, neither should he eat.
140310.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-ye-no tsi-tsv-ye-la-di-do-hv-gi, hi-a na-s-gi nu-s-dv-gi i-tsv-ne-tse-lv-gi, na-s-gi i-yu-no gi-lo nu-du-li-s-gv-na yi-gi, tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi na-s-quo u-li-s-da-yv-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

140311.cherokee: ᎣᏣᏛᎩᎭᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᎨᏣᏓᏑᏴ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎵᏙᎲᎢ, ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲᎾ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᎾᏛᏁᎵᏙᎯ ᎢᎩ.
140311.english: For we hear that there are some which walk among you disorderly, working not at all, but are busybodies.
140311.phonetic: O-tsa-dv-gi-ha-ye-no na-s-gi gi-lo ge-tsa-da-su-yv u-tsa-ti-ni na-na-dv-ne-li-do-hv-i, go-hu-s-di na-na-dv-ne-hv-na, a-se-no a-na-dv-ne-li-do-hi i-gi.

140312.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏙᏥᏁᏤᎭ ᎠᎴ ᏙᏥᏍᏗᏰᏗᎭ ᏙᏥᏁᎢᏍᏓᏁᎭ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏙᎯᏉ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏙᏗᏱ.
140312.english: Now them that are such we command and exhort by our Lord Jesus Christ, that with quietness they work, and eat their own bread.
140312.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no i-yu-na-s-di ge-sv-i, do-tsi-ne-tse-ha a-le do-tsi-s-di-ye-di-ha do-tsi-ne-i-s-da-ne-ha i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, na-s-gi do-hi-quo tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi, a-le u-nv-sv u-na-tse-li a-li-s-da-yv-di u-na-li-s-da-yv-do-di-yi.

140313.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏗᏥᏯᏪᎨᏍᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ.
140313.english: But ye, brethren, be not weary in well doing.
140313.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni, i-da-li-nv-tli, tle-s-di yi-di-tsi-ya-we-ge-s-di o-s-dv de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i.

140314.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏂᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎣᏥᏬᏂᏍᎬ ᎠᏂ ᎣᏦᏪᎵᏍᎬᎢ, ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏁᏨᏁᎸᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᏤᏙᎸᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
140314.english: And if any man obey not our word by this epistle, note that man, and have no company with him, that he may be ashamed.
140314.phonetic: I-yu-no gi-lo ni-go-hi-yu-hv-s-gv-na i-ge-se-s-di o-tsi-wo-ni-s-gv a-ni o-tso-we-li-s-gv-i, gv-ni-ge-sv ne-tsv-ne-lv-ha na-s-gi, a-le tle-s-di i-tsu-la-ha i-tse-do-lv-gi, na-s-gi gv-wa-de-ho-hi-s-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

140315.cherokee: ᎠᏗᎾ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎡᏥᏍᎦᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏰᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎡᏥᎬᏍᎪᎸᎥᏍᎨᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏟ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
140315.english: Yet count him not as an enemy, but admonish him as a brother.
140315.phonetic: A-di-na tle-s-di e-tsi-s-ga-gi i-yu-s-di ye-tsa-da-nv-te-s-ge-s-di, e-tsi-gv-s-go-lv-v-s-ge-s-di-s-gi-ni i-tsa-da-nv-tli na-s-gi-ya-i.

140316.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏃ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎤᏪᎯ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᏎ ᎢᏥᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ.  ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏂᏥᎥ ᏕᏥᎧᎿᎭᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ.
140316.english: Now the Lord of peace himself give you peace always by all means. The Lord be with you all.
140316.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi-no nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv u-we-hi u-wa-sv a-se i-tsi-ne-di ge-se-s-di nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv ni-go-hi-lv-i.  U-gv-wi-yu-hi ni-tsi-v de-tsi-ka-hna-di-do-he-s-di.

140317.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᏉᎳ ᎠᏆᏓᏲᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏋᏒ ᎠᏉᏰᏂ ᎠᏋᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏉᏪᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎪᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎪᏪᎵ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎬᏁᎰ ᎪᏪᎵᏍᎪᎢ.
140317.english: The salutation of Paul with mine own hand, which is the token in every epistle: so I write.
140317.phonetic: A-yv Quo-la a-qua-da-yo-li-s-di ge-sv a-quv-sv a-quo-ye-ni a-quv-ta-nv-hi a-quo-we-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi di-go-li-s-do-di tsi-gi ni-ga-dv go-we-li; na-s-gi-ya ni-gv-ne-ho go-we-li-s-go-i.

140318.cherokee: ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏕᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᏂᏥᎥᎢ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
140318.english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.
140318.phonetic: Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv de-tsi-ka-hna-wa-di-do-he-s-di ni-tsi-v-i.  E-me-nv.
